case_title: CANADA MARBLE & GRANITE, INC. VS KELLER, HANS et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-05-2001, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO MAR-19-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFT. IS TRAVELING ON BUSINESS ON THAT DATE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANADA MARBLE & GRANITE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KELLER, HANS $2,147.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,222.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,296.00 FILED BY CANADA MARBLE & GRANITE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KELLER, HANS KELLER, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KELLER, HANS
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT(FOR COURT USE ONLY): FULL SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT ENTERED AS TO J. DEBTOR: KELLER, HANS (30 DAYS PASSED).
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,300.00 FILED BY KELLER, HANS KELLER, MARIA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CANADA MARBLE & GRANITE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KELLER, HANS KELLER, MARIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CANADA MARBLE & GRANITE, INC. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
